properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: So holy So worthy So great is Your name That the earth will adore You And shout out Your fame

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: To the One To the Lamb To our King upon the throne To the Christ To our Savior To the risen Son of God

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Blessing and honor Glory and power Salvation belongs to our God Blessing and honor Now and forever Salvation belongs to our God

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: To our hope, our Redeemer For the sacrifice You made From our hearts to the heavens For Your glory we proclaim

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: So holy So worthy So great is Your name That the earth will adore You And shout out Your fame

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Blessing and honor Blessing and honor
